input.userMessage: Plan my week: summarize key emails, find the latest roadmap in Drive, then propose meeting slots.

expectedBehavior.reason: Cross-tool task requiring staged execution and synthesized planning.

expectedOutput.goal: Prepare a weekly plan from inbox, drive docs, and schedule

steps.title: Read important unread emails and extract priorities
steps.rationale: Email signals urgent work and dependencies.

steps.title: Search Drive for the latest roadmap document
steps.rationale: Roadmap context guides what meetings are needed.

steps.title: Check calendar and propose 3 feasible meeting slots

risks: Document search may return multiple similarly named files.
Calendar availability can change before confirmation.
